'''Squad Sixteen''' was a [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|super battle droid]] [[Squad/Legends|squad]] stationed on [[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']] during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (unabridged audiobook)}}

|de=Gruppe Sechzehn
}}
